modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need access to a screen in Banner Student.

full_description_text:  
I’m trying to get into a screen in Banner.  
I really need access for my work.  
It’s important for me to do my tasks.  
Please help me with this access request!
